# Kevin Astuhuaman

> AI Product Manager and technical builder focused on applied AI, agents, platforms, and technical products.

Kevin built Trackly, a live job-search product spanning web, iOS, macOS, CLI, MCP, matching, chat, and voice. He previously built a public-safe AI observability prototype at PayPal Checkout and progressed through four product roles at BCP/Credicorp.

## Primary pages

- [Portfolio](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/): Kevin's recruiting profile and selected work
- [Trackly case study](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/projects/trackly/): Product decisions, system quality, and cross-platform delivery
- [Resume](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/resume/): Complete chronological experience
- [Public evidence](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/proof/): Sources and context for published claims
- [Contact](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/contact/): LinkedIn and email
- [Ask Kevin's portfolio](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/ask/): Public-corpus assistant with static cited answers

## Machine-readable context

- [Full plain-text profile](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/llms-full.txt): Detailed public recruiting context
- [Structured profile](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/profile.json): Public identity, experience, and claims
- [Structured projects](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/projects.json): Project summaries and canonical links
- [Markdown resume](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/resume.md): Crawlable resume equivalent
